zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Casper Repp於1716年3月28日出生在德國賀瑟維特勞時，他的父親Wilhelm Conrad Repp36歲，母親Anna Barbara33歲。他於1742年與Catharina Gebhard在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1737年移民到美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞。他去世於1786年1月10日在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯享年69歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯洛可藍德 堂史普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Casper Repp于1716年3月28日出生在德国賀瑟維特勞时，他的父亲Wilhelm Conrad Repp36岁，母亲Anna Barbara33岁。他于1742年与Catharina Gebhard在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1737年移民到美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞。他去世于1786年1月10日在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯享年69岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯洛可藍德 堂史普。

nameMeanings.name: Repp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: metonymic occupational name for a ropemaker, from Middle Low German rēp, rep ‘rope’.
German and Dutch: from a short form of the personal name   Reppert  .
Americanized form of Slovenian and Croatian Rep: nickname from rep ‘tail’, probably denoting a man wearing long-tail hairstyle.

variants.name: Reppert
meanings: German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Ratbert, composed of the elements rād, rāt ‘counsel, advice’ + berht ‘bright’.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Casper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Jasper , also found as a variant in English. According to legend, this was the name of one of the three Magi or ‘wise men’ who brought gifts to the infant Christ. The Magi are not named in the Bible, but early Christian tradition assigned them the names Caspar, Balthasar, and Melchior. Among the best known bearers in modern times is the U.S. statesman Caspar Weinberger ( 1917–2006 ).

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1752: Berks, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Berks, Pennsylvania, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Casper Repp was born on 28 March 1716, in Wetterau, Hesse, Germany, his father, Wilhelm Conrad Repp, was 36 and his mother, Anna Barbara, was 33. He married Catharina Gebhard in 1742, in Berks, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He immigrated to Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States in 1737. He died on 10 January 1786, in Berks, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 69, and was buried in Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Casper Repp est né le 28 mars 1716, à Wetterau, Hessen, Allemagne, son père, Wilhelm Conrad Repp, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anna Barbara, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Catharina Gebhard en 1742, à Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a immigré au Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1737. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1786, à Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Casper Repp am 28. März 1716 in Wetterau, Hessen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wilhelm Conrad Repp 36 und seine Mutter Anna Barbara 33. Er hat 1742 in Berks, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Catharina Gebhard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er ist 1737 nach Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten eingewandert. Er starb am 10. Januar 1786 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Berks, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Casper Repp è nato il il 28 marzo 1716 nel Wetterau, Hessen, Germania, il suo padre, Wilhelm Conrad Repp, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anna Barbara, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Catharina Gebhard nel 1742, nel Berks, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrato nel Filadelfia, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1737. Morì il 10 gennaio 1786, nel Berks, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Casper Reppが1716年3月28日にドイツヘセンウエッテラウで生まれた時，父Wilhelm Conrad Reppは36歳，母Anna Barbaraは33歳であった。1742年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスでCatharina Gebhardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1737年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアに移住した。彼は1786年1月10日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスで69歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスロックランド トウンシュイップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Casper Repp(이)가 1716년 3월 28일 독일 헤센 베터오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wilhelm Conrad Repp(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Barbara(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1742년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스에서 Catharina Gebhard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1737년에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1786년 1월 10일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 록랜드 타운시프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Casper Repp nasceu em 28 de março de 1716, em Wetterau, Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Wilhelm Conrad Repp, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anna Barbara, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Catharina Gebhard em 1742, em Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Filadélfia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1737. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1786, em Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Rockland Township, Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Casper Repp родился 28 марта 1716 г. в местности веттирау, Гессен, Германия, его отцу по имени Wilhelm Conrad Repp было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Barbara, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Catharina Gebhard в 1742 г. в местности биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1737 году. Он умер 10 января 1786 г. в местности биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности роккланд тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Casper Repp nació el 28 de marzo de 1716, en Wetterau, Hessen, Alemania, su papá, Wilhelm Conrad Repp, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anna Barbara, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Catharina Gebhard en 1742, en Berks, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Inmigró a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos en 1737. Murió el 10 de enero de 1786, en Berks, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Rockland Township, Berks, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
